slice_name: Tag a client project with a label

flows.name: Freelancer sets a label on a client project; the label persists and renders
flows.trigger: Authenticated freelancer submits a set-label request for an existing project via the web application

steps.action: Web Ingress receives the HTTP set-label request (POST projects/<id>/label) and dispatches it in-process to Project Management via the new additive route
Project Management calls Identity & Auth in-process to resolve the current authenticated session and scope the label write to the owning freelancer's project (reused CT3, unchanged)
Project Management persists the additive label field on the existing project record via the Data Store (CT2 extension, A14); reads it back so the label renders on the project in the list

failure_path.trigger: Freelancer submits a set-label request but the data store is unreachable
failure_path.arrives_at: Data Store raises StoreUnavailableError on the label write; Project Management propagates it unmodified; Web Ingress surfaces the persistence error as an HTTP error (503); the label is not persisted
